zh.lifeSummary: 當Albrecht II von Habsburg於1255年7月3日出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登時，他的父親Rudolf I von Habsburg37歲，母親Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg25歲。他於1274年12月20日與Elisabeth of Carinthia在奧地利維恩結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年5月1日在瑞士阿高布盧潔享年52歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲斯培也斯培也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Albrecht II von Habsburg于1255年7月3日出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登时，他的父亲Rudolf I von Habsburg37岁，母亲Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg25岁。他于1274年12月20日与Elisabeth of Carinthia在奥地利維恩结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年5月1日在瑞士阿高布盧潔享年52岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲斯培也斯培也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Albrecht
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Albrecht II von Habsburg was born on 3 July 1255, in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Switzerland, his father, Rudolf I von Habsburg, was 37 and his mother, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, was 25. He married Elisabeth of Carinthia on 20 December 1274, in Vienna, Austria. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 1 May 1308, in Brugg, Aargau, Switzerland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Speyer, Speyer, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Albrecht II von Habsburg est né le 3 juillet 1255, à Rheinfelden, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Rudolf I von Habsburg, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth of Carinthia le 20 décembre 1274, à Vienne, Autriche. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1308, à Brugg, Argovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Albrecht II von Habsburg am 3. Juli 1255 in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rudolf I von Habsburg 37 und seine Mutter Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg 25. Er hat am 20. Dezember 1274 in Wien, Österreich Elisabeth of Carinthia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1308 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Brugg, Aargau, Schweiz und wurde in Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II von Habsburg è nato il il 3 luglio 1255 nel Rheinfelden, Argovia, Svizzera, il suo padre, Rudolf I von Habsburg, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth of Carinthia il 20 dicembre 1274, nel Wien, Austria. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 maggio 1308, nel Brugg, Argovia, Svizzera, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Albrecht II von Habsburgが1255年7月3日にスイスアールガウルヘインフエルデンで生まれた時，父Rudolf I von Habsburgは37歳，母Gertrud Anna von Hohenbergは25歳であった。1274年12月20日にオーストリアウィンでElisabeth of Carinthiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年5月1日にスイスアールガウブルググで52歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズスペヤースペヤーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Albrecht II von Habsburg(이)가 1255년 7월 3일 스위스 아아르가 리인펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rudolf I von Habsburg(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1274년 12월 20일 오스트리아 빈에서 Elisabeth of Carinthia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 5월 1일 스위스 아아르가 브루그에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스피어 스피어에 묻혔다.

mn.3 July 1255–1 May 1308: 1255 оны Долоодугаар сарын 3–1308 оны Тавдугаар сарын 1

pt.3 July 1255–1 May 1308: 3 de julho de 1255–1 de maio de 1308
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Albrecht II von Habsburg nasceu em 3 de julho de 1255, em Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth of Carinthia em 20 de dezembro de 1274, em Wien, Áustria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1308, em Brugg, Aargau, Suiça, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Albrecht II von Habsburg родился 3 июля 1255 г. в местности раинфелден, ааргау, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Rudolf I von Habsburg было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth of Carinthia 20 декабря 1274 г. в местности Вена, Австрия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 1 мая 1308 г. в местности бруг, ааргау, Швейцария в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности спиир, спиир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.3 July 1255–1 May 1308: 3 de julio de 1255–1 de mayo de 1308
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Albrecht II von Habsburg nació el 3 de julio de 1255, en Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elisabeth of Carinthia el 20 de diciembre de 1274, en Wien, Austria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1308, en Brugg, Aargau, Suiza, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Speyer, Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
